summary: Grounded 4 movement-driven scenes. Growth: 35.6% (2168 -> 2940). Key enrichments: named King's Road, Eastweald, Darrowshire, Caer Darrow carryover, Silvermoon/Convocation politics, Rommath and the Runestones, Antonidas/Violet Citadel/Council of Six pressure, Hearthglen military relay, and Stratholme food-route triage. Kept Jaina POV tight and the study omission unresolved.
